mapper.select:
select employee.*, department.name as departmentName from `employee` left join department on employee.department_id = department.id
employee.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
order by employee.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into `employee` (username, password, role, name, sex, no, age, description, department_id, avatar) values (#{username},#{password},#{role},#{name},#{sex},#{no},#{age},#{description},#{departmentId},#{avatar})
